notes: OTTO e-commerce homepage. Cookie consent overlay may be blocking parts of the page. Model reliably detects search, checkout/cart, and consent. Auth and navigation are present but may be partially obscured by consent overlay. Reduced to core visible endpoints that model can reliably detect.

endpoints.label: Search Bar
endpoints.description: Product search input field at the top

endpoints.label: Shopping Cart
endpoints.description: Cart icon in header linking to basket

endpoints.label: Cookie Consent Banner
endpoints.description: GDPR cookie consent overlay with accept/reject options

endpoints.label: Main Navigation
endpoints.description: Category navigation bar: Mode, Schuhe, Multimedia, Wohnen, Sport, etc.
